SS2_ENGINEER_LASERFOCUS_DESC: Release two beams of energy pro <style=cIsDamage>2x150% vulnere</style>. Damage <style=cIsDamage>increases</style> <style=cIsUtility>longer a target is focused upon</style>.
SS2_ENGINEER_RAPIDDISPLACEMENT_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Stunning</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Move forward</style>, pushing any entities in the way pro <style=cIsDamage>200% vulnere</style>.
SS2_BANDIT_TRANQ_GUN_DESC: Puga sagittam tranquilizer pro <style=cIsDamage>{0}% vulnere</style>, <style=cIsUtility>tardans</style> et denique <style=cIsUtility>stupefaciens</style> hostes. Potest habere usque ad 4 sagittas.
SS2_RAILGUNNER_ROLL_DESC: Roll a short distance et perform a perfect reload si reloading.
